page.title: Events Management
page.subtitle: Plan and track your event workforce requirements.

search.placeholder: Search events by name or region...

table.title: Events
table.name: Event Name
table.expiryTip: SMP Companies expiry dates should be set as the project's contractual expiry date.
table.noEventsHelp: Create your first event to get started

type.ongoingHelp: This event has no fixed end date. Workers can be offboarded manually at any time.

create.title: Create Event
create.successDesc: The event has been added successfully.

form.name: Event Name
form.descPh: Brief overview of this event's scope and goals...

validation.name: Event name is required
validation.headcount: Target headcount must be at least 1

close.title: Close Event?
close.warn1: All active workers assigned to this event will become eligible for offboarding
close.warn2: Payroll cycles referencing this event will be finalised
close.warn3: New workers cannot be assigned to a closed event
close.warn4: This action is recorded in the audit log
close.note: You can reopen the event later if needed.
close.successDesc: Workers with completed service periods will appear in the offboarding queue.

reopen.title: Reopen Event?
reopen.intro: You are about to reopen "{{name}}" and set it back to Active.
reopen.note1: Employees already in the offboarding queue will remain there
reopen.note2: Workers can be assigned to this event again
reopen.note3: This action is recorded in the audit log
reopen.reasonPh: e.g. Event dates extended, error correction...
